OST_MEDICARE Osteoporosis Indicator - Medicare-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicare data, for having Osteoporosis Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met,
